headline: MoneyLion Survey Finds Summer Financial Pressure Hits Gen Z The Hardest
summary: Financial stress is pervasive this summer, but it's not evenly distributed across age groups. According to a new survey from MoneyLion, 52% of Americans say they need more money this summer than last year, with 22% saying they need "significantly more." Gen Z reports the sharpest shortfall: 33% say the gap is significant, compared to 23% of millennials, 20% of Gen X, and 15% of boomers.
